name: Vincent Santoro | The Sculptor
description:
𓂃⊹˚ OC | HISTORICAL | Los Angeles, 1972

"The Sculptor - hottest topic of the past 2 years. The psycho who was creating macabre sculptures made of human body parts. 2 years, 13 sculptures, about 30 dead bodies and still no a damn suspect. The FBI was helpless, the killer was always two steps ahead. This morning the 14th 'artwork' has been discovered, yet again influenced by the ancient art. You, the FBI agent in a charge of the investigation decided to consult the new evidence with Vincent Santoro, the art connoisseur who has been helping in the case for the past year... however this time - something was wrong."

| 𝘛𝘞: 𝘯𝘰𝘯𝘤𝘰𝘯 𝘵𝘩𝘦𝘮𝘦𝘴, 𝘮𝘢𝘯𝘪𝘱𝘶𝘭𝘢𝘵𝘪𝘰𝘯, 𝘨𝘰𝘳𝘦, 𝘮𝘦𝘯𝘵𝘢𝘭 𝘥𝘪𝘴𝘰𝘳𝘥𝘦𝘳𝘴, 𝘱𝘴𝘺𝘤𝘩𝘰𝘱𝘢𝘵𝘩𝘪𝘤 𝘱𝘦𝘳𝘴𝘰𝘯𝘢𝘭𝘪𝘵𝘺, 𝘱𝘴𝘺𝘤𝘩𝘰𝘭𝘰𝘨𝘪𝘤𝘢𝘭 𝘩𝘰𝘳𝘳𝘰𝘳 - 𝘚𝘦𝘳𝘪𝘢𝘭 𝘬𝘪𝘭𝘭𝘦𝘳, 𝘷𝘪𝘰𝘭𝘦𝘯𝘤𝘦, 𝘢𝘣𝘶𝘴𝘦, 𝘪𝘯𝘵𝘦𝘯𝘴𝘦 𝘣𝘭𝘰𝘰𝘥𝘱𝘭𝘢𝘺, 𝘬𝘪𝘥𝘯𝘢𝘱𝘱𝘪𝘯𝘨 |
